market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your stylish 2‑bedroom home in the heart of Manchester, perfect for families or groups of up to four guests. This entire‑home rental offers a bright living area, fully equipped kitchen, two comfortable bedrooms and a clean bathroom, all designed for a hassle‑free stay. Rated 4.82 from 17 guest reviews, the property consistently earns praise for its cleanliness and convenient layout. You’ll enjoy a nightly rate of £103, which is 33 % lower than the city’s median of £154.60, giving you excellent value without compromising comfort. While the next 90 days show a 38 % occupancy (56 open nights), there’s ample opportunity to attract more bookings by highlighting the price advantage and adding a few high‑impact amenities. The home is located in a well‑connected Manchester neighbourhood, close to public transport, shops, and popular attractions, making it easy to explore the city. Though the host is not yet a Superhost, the strong rating and positive feedback demonstrate a commitment to guest satisfaction. Book now to experience a cozy Manchester stay at an unbeatable price, and enjoy the flexibility of a fully self‑catered space where you can relax after a day of sightseeing or business.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, well‑lit living‑room shot as the cover photo—it showcases the main gathering space and sets an inviting tone for potential guests.
key_diagnosis: Highlight the 33 % price advantage in the title and description to turn the low nightly rate into a strong selling point (rate £103 vs median £154.60).
Add at least 3 high‑value amenities (e.g., free parking, outdoor patio, streaming TV) to address the top amenity gaps and boost perceived value.
Upload a minimum of 8 high‑quality photos covering the living room, kitchen, both bedrooms, bathroom, and exterior to improve the image score (currently unknown/low).
analysis.outreach_hook: Even though you’re charging £103/night—33 % below Manchester’s median—you’re only at 38 % occupancy over the next 90 days.
